approach: Case split on MontgomeryAffine. Infinity: both sides 0. Finite: chain field_mul_assoc + inv_mul_cancel + field_mul_comm + field_mul_one_right to show U/W = u mod p. Needed explicit assertions to guide SMT.
key_insight: Given U = u*W with W != 0: U*W^{-1} = u*W*W^{-1} = u*1 = u mod p. Required small_mod lemma to establish W%p != 0 from W < p.
notes: First attempt had compilation error (non-existent function name), fixed on same attempt. Second compilation had postcondition failure due to insufficient assertions for SMT solver. Added explicit assertion chain to guide solver.
